video_info.title: Main Woh Aur Fuji
video_info.shortDescription: In a world where love is filtered, scored and predicted, a couple in Pune collides in a fierce, consuming romance. What begins in urgency and desire slowly fractures. Seven years later, beneath the shadow of Mount Fuji, they meet again carrying different lives, different scars, confronting a past that never truly left them. Can love survive its own history or shall it merely haunt them? Witness Lalit Prabhakar and Mrinmayee Godbole in a fresh, new-age romantic movie Main Woh Aur Fuji, streaming from 10th April, on Sony LIV.
